_schema.description: Daily nutrition log for MK — aligned to Cronometer daily summary export format.
how_to_populate: Option A (Recommended): In Cronometer, go to Settings → Export Data → Daily Nutrition Summary. Copy the relevant daily row fields into this file.
Option B: Manual entry from Cronometer's daily summary view.
Option C: Use Claude to help you transcribe a Cronometer CSV export into this format.

daily._comment: EXAMPLE ENTRY — delete this and replace with your real data
daily.notes: Example entry. Pre-ride: oats + banana. Post-ride: whey shake + yogurt. Dinner: salmon + rice.

weekly_targets._note: Claude will compute 7-day rolling averages from daily entries. These are reference targets only.

cronometer_field_mapping._note: Maps Cronometer CSV export column names to fields in this schema
cronometer_field_mapping.Water (g): water_ml — note: Cronometer reports grams, which equals ml for water
